item.name: Variegated Sisterscale
item.description:
With resplendent rainbow scales and pink fins, this pretty fish has many admirers in the angler community.

[Suitable for display in aquariums tier 1 and higher.]
[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: Legend has it that these colorful wavekin are descendants of two scaly sisters born from a mighty rainbow. As they dart and weave through the depths, their movements form tiny bridges of iridescent light.
